violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Adjust items in upright reach in cooler to allow for better air circulation. Monitor product temperatures. Adjust temperature setting as needed.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Keep hand sink clear of items to encourage proper hand washing.
Clean, proper temperature, cleaning agent (2 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
